title: Survey - reporting an experimental protocol
author: Olga Giraldo
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This survey was designed to enrich and validate a set of guidelines for reporting experimental protocols in life science. A total of 23 domain experts participated in this survey. The online survey is available at: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdLqFAXgjhiYSM2UuCKC3R8C7jQaHwp4DniEd3QDnz0jXQE9A/viewform
